name: HRC_USER_MSG_CONFIG
description: This table holds details of configuration specific to a certain user for communication messages

columns.Name: USER_MSG_CONFIGID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for message configuration of a particular user

columns.Name: PERSONID
columns.Comments: Person id of the user for whom the corresponding message configation is stored

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: Username of the user for whom the corresponding message configation is stored

columns.Name: USERGUID
columns.Comments: GUID of the user for whom the corresponding message configation is stored

columns.Name: CONFIGTYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the configuration for the specific user

columns.Name: CONFIGOBJECT
columns.Comments: Configuration object corresponding to a particular user

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
